'''kapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hydrographically|hydrographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hydrographically|hydrographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kapate|kapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kapatesher|kapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapatesherĂ«m|kapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kapatero|kapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kapateshĂ«|kapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapateshĂ«m|kapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikapatero|gokikapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikapateshĂ«|gokikapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapateshĂ«m|gokikapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokapankerom|gokapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokapankeshĂ«|gokapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapankeshĂ«m|gokapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokapankeya|gokapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kapaterom|kapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapatemu|kapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kapateya|kapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikapaterom|gokikapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapatemu|gokikapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikapateya|gokikapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kapapate|kapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kapapatesher|kapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapapatesherĂ«m|kapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kapapatero|kapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kapapateshĂ«|kapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapapateshĂ«m|kapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikapapatero|gokikapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikapapateshĂ«|gokikapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapapateshĂ«m|gokikapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokapapankerom|gokapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokapapankeshĂ«|gokapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapapankeshĂ«m|gokapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokapapankeya|gokapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kapapaterom|kapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapapatemu|kapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kapapateya|kapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikapapaterom|gokikapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapapatemu|gokikapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikapapateya|gokikapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠte|kĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠtesher|kĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠtero|kĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠpĂŠtero|gokikĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠterom|kĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠtemu|kĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠteya|kĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠpĂŠterom|gokikĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠpĂŠteya|gokikĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafpafte|kafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafpaftesher|kafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafpaftesherĂ«m|kafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafpaftero|kafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafpafteshĂ«|kafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafpafteshĂ«m|kafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafpaftero|gokikafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafpafteshĂ«|gokikafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafpafteshĂ«m|gokikafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafpafnkerom|gokafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafpafnkeshĂ«|gokafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafpafnkeshĂ«m|gokafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafpafnkeya|gokafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafpafterom|kafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafpaftemu|kafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafpafteya|kafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafpafterom|gokikafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafpaftemu|gokikafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafpafteya|gokikafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
